features: simultaneous sales from PasarGuard and shared Marzban
per-location destination panel selection during create and edit
persistent service_provider on each order and trial so renew, volume, sync, revoke and delete stay on the original panel
category and location edit/delete in reseller bot and web panel
safe location delete deactivates attached plans while existing delivered services retain their original provider
provider-aware scheduled notifications, auto-renew, health checks and usage synchronization

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload ZIP through the central bot

validation.schema: passed: SCHEMA_SQL executed in SQLite; backend_provider/service_provider columns present
validation.catalog_operations: passed: category edit/delete and location edit/safe-delete paths present in central bot, reseller bot and web panel
validation.provider_persistence: passed: service_provider is stored on each order/trial and used by create, renew, volume, sync, revoke and delete paths
validation.telegram_callback_limit: passed: all new confirm callbacks <= 64 bytes with 36-character IDs
validation.live_api_calls: not run: production PasarGuard and Marzban credentials unavailable
validation.provider_hardening: passed: imported services, auto-renew, health checks and Marzban snapshot updates are provider-scoped
validation.safe_location_delete: passed: attached plans become inactive before location removal
validation.dual_usage_sync: passed: PasarGuard and Marzban usage paths execute independently without global backend override

limitations: live Marzban and PasarGuard API calls require production credentials
